title: Department Manager Vacancy at Big Bazaar Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Big Bazaar Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Big Bazaar Ventures Solutions invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Department Manager at our Nashik location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Big Bazaar Ventures Solutions:
Big Bazaar Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Big Bazaar Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
